subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope! Thou art sanctified above my praise and exalted beyond my tributes, my attributes and my utterance. Unto Thee be praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی انت المقدس عن ثناای و المنزه عن محامدی و نعوتی و بیانی لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
